signals.title: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
signals.summary: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.
signals.aiSummary: 波士顿儿童医院使用OpenAI技术诊断40多例罕见疾病，展示AI在医疗诊断领域的突破性应用

signals.title: OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework
signals.summary: Explore OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布前沿治理框架，规范AI安全与风险管理实践，对接欧盟加州监管要求

signals.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
signals.summary: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.
signals.aiSummary: 思科与OpenAI合作使用Codex重新定义企业工程，推动AI原生开发和自动化缺陷修复

signals.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
signals.summary: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.
signals.aiSummary: Warp基于GPT-5.5构建开源开发工具，整合编程代理工作流，代表AI原生开发入口的重要探索

signals.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
signals.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI被Gartner评为企业AI编程代理领导者，Codex在创新和企业级部署方面获得认可

signals.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
signals.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI模型解决80年数学难题，证明AI在科学发现领域的突破能力，推动AI应用边界扩展

signals.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
signals.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI与新加坡建立多年AI合作伙伴关系，推动本地AI部署、人才培养和商业应用

signals.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
signals.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI推出内容来源验证工具，通过Content Credentials等技术帮助识别AI生成内容，提升生态透明度
